text: Hi there, I found your profile on the university alumni directory. I'm a recent grad in the same field and would love to ask you a few questions about your career path. Would you be open to a 15-minute chat next week?
To the mods of r/woodworking: why was my post removed? I didn't break any rules. Unbelievable.
Hey, you seem cool. I saw you like hiking and indie films. Want to grab coffee this Saturday?
I bought your 'vintage' lamp and it arrived broken. The box wasn't even damaged. I want a full refund or I'm filing a chargeback.
Does anyone know a good mechanic in the Astoria area? My car's making a weird noise and I don't want to get ripped off.

Hello, I'm reaching out about the position you posted on LinkedIn. I've attached my resume and a portfolio link. I'm particularly interested in your work on renewable energy projects. Thank you for your time.
Excuse me, can you tell me how to get to the nearest subway station? I think I'm lost.
Hey, I'm from out of town and saw your band is playing at The Hideout tonight. Any chance I could crash on your couch after the show? I'll buy you a beer.
This product is absolute garbage. Stopped working after two weeks. Don't waste your money.
I noticed your open-source repo on neural networks. I've been following your commits for months. Would you be open to mentoring me on my first pull request? Happy to contribute in any way I can.
Hi, I'm looking for a used mountain bike under $300. Must be in good condition. Cash in hand. Email me at bikeguy42@email.com.

Bug report: When I click 'Save' on the edit profile page, the page reloads but nothing is saved. Using Chrome 120 on Windows 10. Steps to reproduce: 1) Go to /settings/profile 2) Change username 3) Click Save. Expected: username updated. Actual: page refresh with no change.

Hello Dr. Chen, I read your paper on quantum error correction and found it fascinating. I'm a PhD student at MIT working on related topics. Would you be open to a 15-minute chat next week? I'd love to hear your perspective. Best, Alex
Excuse me, is this the right platform for the 42 bus to downtown? I need to get to Main and 3rd. Thanks.
Hey, your profile pic with the dog is adorable. I'm also a huge fan of hiking — just did the Pacific Crest Trail last summer. What's your favorite trail around here?
To the person who parked their silver Honda in front of my driveway at 123 Oak St: you're an idiot. Move it now or I'm calling a tow truck.
Can anyone here recommend a good plumber in Austin? My kitchen sink is leaking and I need someone reliable who won't charge an arm and a leg. Thanks.
I'm selling a barely-used Nintendo Switch with two games (Zelda and Mario). Works perfectly, no scratches. $200 firm. Pick up in Brooklyn. Text 555-0199.

Hi, I'm a frontend developer with 5 years' experience reaching out from your LinkedIn profile. I saw you work at Stripe and I'd love to learn about your team's tech stack. Would you be open to a quick coffee chat this week?
You seem interesting. What's the last book you read that actually changed your mind about something? Mine was 'Thinking, Fast and Slow'.
